languages.text: Переработанные человеческие останки сбросили на нижние уровни — холод добрался до них быстрее трупного разложения.

traits.locale_text: Переработанные человеческие останки сбросили на нижние уровни — холод добрался до них быстрее трупного разложения.
Переработанные человеческие останки сбросили на нижние уровни — холод добрался до них быстрее трупного разложения.

languages.text: The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.
languages.original_text: Переработанные человеческие останки сбросили на нижние уровни — холод добрался до них быстрее трупного разложения.

traits.locale_text: The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.
The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.
The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.

languages.text: Die verarbeiteten menschlichen Überreste wurden in die unteren Stockwerke gekippt — die Kälte setzte ihnen schneller zu als die Verwesung.
languages.original_text: The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.

languages.text: Les restes humains traités ont été jetés aux niveaux inférieurs — le froid les a atteints plus rapidement que la décomposition.
languages.original_text: The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.

languages.text: 处理过的遗骸被倾倒在较低的楼层--寒冷比腐烂来得更快。
languages.original_text: The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.

languages.text: Los restos humanos procesados se arrojaron a los niveles inferiores: el frío llegó a ellos más rápido que la descomposición.
languages.original_text: The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.

languages.text: 処理された遺骨は下の階に捨てられた。
languages.original_text: The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.

languages.text: İşlenmiş insan kalıntıları alt katlara atılmıştır — soğuk onları çürümeden daha hızlı etkilemiştir.
languages.original_text: The processed human remains were dumped to the lower levels — the cold got to them faster than decomposition.
